mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.room_no, b.bed_no, b.status, b.customer_id, b.create_time, b.update_time, c.name AS customer_name FROM bed b LEFT JOIN customer c ON b.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0
AND (b.room_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.bed_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
